calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Maureen Howard. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. and Defendant represented by Bao-Quan Pham, Esq. Case is settled by stipulation of the parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2002 Reset For Jury Trial

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-15-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. 626-6494 for Plaintiff and opposing party
